transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
For today's mukbang,
I recently moved to a new place
So I've been wanting to eat Chinese food as a tradition
Better late than never
I have the black bean noodles, spicy seafood noodles, fried pork with sweet & sour sauce, and..
Fried shrimp, fried chicken with sauce
It's my first time ordering this
It was delicious the last time I had it
So I ordered it
Looks good
Let's mix it up
It's not stuck together yet
Bon appetit
That's really good
Let's try the fried pork without the sauce It looks interesting

It looks weird, right?
That just tastes like pork cutlet
Not tangsuyuk
The meat is huge
It's about 3 times bigger than the regular ones
[Chat: If the black bean noodles are good, then the spicy seafood noodles will be bad]
It's stuck together
This one has less soup
Who made that statement earlier?
You're a genius
This is called Uringi
It's a chicken dish deep-fried with glutinous rice and veggies
It's really delicious
So much better than fried pork
It's chewy
This time,

Fried shrimp with sauce
That's big
It's spicy
I'm going to finish this bowl first
I think this tastes the best here
It's really good
It's a very chewy deep-fried chicken dish
Eating it like a salad
They used starch
The outside is very crispy and the inside is chewy
The noodles are good
It's not on the screen, but I have the sweet & sour sauce
The sauce is thick and sweet Tastes like a very old-fashioned black bean sauce
The fried pork is so huge
It's seriously like 3 times bigger than the normal ones
Yum

Shrimp?
The shrimp is big too
Very meaty
Some fried pork
It's too big
This has to be eaten together?
The sauce is like soy sauce
The spicy seafood noodles..
It's a lot
Why'd they give me so much?
The shrimp is spicy
Really spicy
I didn't even eat that many
It's okay to eat the fried chicken with veggies
The black bean noodles are tasty
I've never seen such big tangsuyuk pieces

It's just fried meat
It's weird that when it comes to Chinese food,
I was just about to say something
But I forgot
They use really big shrimps
The shrimp itself is really big
[Chat: Spicy Seafood Udon!?]
Does it look like that?
You have to dine-in for noodles like this
Apart from its taste,
It's just too hard to chew
Do you want to see the inside?
The meat is really hard
Okay maybe not this one But the previous one was really hard to chew
Pour the sauce on it?
A lot of people will not like that

I'll pour half
Just in the back
There are a lot of pineapples
I really don't care how it's eaten; poured or dipped
If the sauce is stir-fried together, it can still stay crispy
They're too big for 1 bite
The glutinous rice fried pork is very popular
I like kkwobarou better
Looks weird, right?
The size is different
[Chat: What do you like the best?] Black bean noodles and the fried chicken with sauce
I just bit my cheek so hard
I was chewing really hard because the meat was hard
That hurts
The fried pork is big, but it's not good
Spicy seafood noodles..?

Ouch
How's the pork so hard?
It's 3 times more dry than chicken breast
I finished the black bean noodles
Udon.. I mean
Stir-fried seafood noodles are too..
It just doesn't taste good
I'll cook some Ramyun noodles instead
Bon appetit
